_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved.

hazards.title: Manual handling — soil bags + turf rolls
hazards.risk: Soil bags 25–30kg; turf rolls ~15kg but many lifts; bending repetitive

controls.title: Rotate between laying / soil prep to share bending load

hazards.title: Snake / spider bite
hazards.risk: Overgrown vegetation / stored materials harbouring snakes / spiders

controls.title: Long pants + boots when reaching into vegetation / piles
Visual check before reaching into pile or planted bed
15-min shade break every hour > 28C WBGT; stop > 32C if no acclimatisation

hazards.title: Fertilisers / soil treatments
hazards.risk: Skin / eye contact with concentrate; some products are SDS-listed dangerous goods

controls.title: SDS for any concentrate on site

hazards.title: Cut hands — secateurs, edge cutters, turf knives

tasks: Pre-start: confirm soil prep level + drainage acceptable.
Visual check beds + storage piles for snakes / spiders before reaching in.
Plant per planting plan; mulch beds.
Lay turf in staggered courses; tight joints; roll.
Maintenance / watering schedule briefed to owner.
